alignment_Auto_NVM_filter.K_Max_NVM_Writ.comment: Calibration value specifies the maximum allowed number of storing into NVM during one driving cycle

alignment_Auto_NVM_filter.K_delta_thresh.comment: Delta threshold angle between stored and current misalignment angle

alignment_Auto_NVM_filter.Min_time_betwe.comment: This parameter define the minimum time between two succsseive write request from alignment Manager t

lists.0: AA have not converged in current operation cycle, system are runing on previosly stored data (EOL/ST/OverWritingValue/SA + Stored AA)
lists.1: AA function has converged (AA value have been stored to NVM)
Autolignment complete (value can not be written)

cfg.ALIGNMENT_STATUS.CurrentAlignmentAng.comment: Azimuth deviation, used for reading the Auto alignment angle

cfg.ALIGNMENT_STATUS.EOLAlignmentAngle.comment: Azimuth deviation, used for reading the Auto alignment angle

cfg.VEHICLE_CONF.FrontAxleDistance.comment: From front bumper to front axle

cfg.VEHICLE_CONF.MPUSelection.comment: Select MPU (meter or multimedia), choose between ECU which sends activation signals

lists.1: Alignment condition not ready(Vehicle is moving)
lists.2: Alignment condition not ready(System failure detected)
lists.3: Alignment condition not ready(System failure detected and Vehicle moving)

Current_Assignation_pin_value.comment: Current position value for the radar(see codding)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LSS_TRIGGER.BSW_So.comment: Possibility to activiate or deactivate the sound for alert

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LED.bulb_check_act.comment: Request activation or deactivation of the bulb check.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LED.bulb_check_dur.comment: Define how long time is the bulb check.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LED_Luminance.DayB.comment: Duty cycle for LED  blink at Day(0%-100%)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LED_Luminance.Nigh.comment: Duty cycle for LED blink at Night(0%-100%)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LED_Luminance.DayC.comment: Duty cycle for LED continious on at Day(0%-100%)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.LED_Luminance.Nigh.comment: Duty cycle for LED continious on at Night(0%-100%)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.A_BCI_function_ava.comment: State of CTA function is linked to BCI function

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTA_TTC_.comment: Target time to collision from ego. When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatically adapted to the limit.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.DETECTION.comment:
- Distance zone from bumper to rear to define the CTA zone limit.
- value send via DID will be unsigned and the "-" will be added in code.
- When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatically adapted to the limit.

- Distance zone from bumper to front to define the CTA zone limit.
- When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatically adapted to the limit.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTA_EGO_.comment:
- Speed max vehicle fitted with side radars to have RCTA activated
- When value is out of the range

- Speed min vehicle fitted with side radars to have RCTA activated
- value send via DID will be uns

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTA_TARG.comment:
- Target speed min to get an alert
- When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatical

- Target speed max to get an alert
- When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatical

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTA_ANGL.comment:
- Approching angle min to consider the target as relevant.
- When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatically adapted to the limit.

- Approching angle max to consider the target as relevant.
- When value is out of the range, the value shall be automatically adapted to the limit.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.TempoWhen.comment: Filter rear gear concidered as selected, for manual and automatic gear box

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTASound.comment: Possibility to deactivate the sound for alert level 1.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.ResetRCTA.comment: RCTA state after a reset (reset request done by customer on HMI). This DIDs specifies the default state for RCTA after a "RCTA State Reset".

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTASound.comment: Possibility to deactivate the sound for alert level 2.

lists.0: LED is switched ON for the side related to the alert
lists.1: LED left AND right are switched ON independently of where is coming the alert

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTAledMa.comment: Activate one or two LEDs for an alert.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTAledSo.comment: Mirror LED : possility to have a solid LED alert or blinking LED alert

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTA_Auto.comment: RCTA activation state (prm.RCTA_SystemState) after new ignition

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_DEV.RCTAdelay.comment:
When an alert is ON, the LED managed by the side radar shall be deferrable
When an alert is ON, LED is switch on with delay (be synchronized with the IVI delay due to processing time)
When an alert is OFF, LED is switch OFF with delay (be synchronized with the IVI delay due to processing time)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.RCTA_TRIGGER.SideR.comment:
RCTA activation/deactivation,  to activate or deactivate function with all LED warnings, CAN outputs and related Error monitorings (see RCTA statemachine)
This info shall have highest priority for deactivation and shall deactivate RCTA LED and RCTA failsafe.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_DEV.INFORMATO.comment: Lateral distance between vehicle side and the neareast side of information zone.
Lateral distance between vehicle side and the furthest side of information zone.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_DEV.BSIS_UC2_.comment: Distance that the target will travel before stopping the warning in the dynamic UC2

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_DEV.BSIS_EGO_.comment: Speed max vehicle fitted with side radars to have BSIS activated
Parameter used for the hysteresis of the EGO speed max in dynamic use cases to avoid alert toggling

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_DEV.BSIS_STAT.comment: Target speed max to get an alert in a static use case

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_DEV.BSIS_TARG.comment: Target speed min to get an alert
Target speed max to get an alert

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_DEV.TempoWhen.comment: Filter rear gear concidered as selected, for manual and automatic gear box (The system shall wait a delay defined by parameter TempoWhenRearGearTransitions (default value : 0.2s) before taking in account gear position.)

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_TRIGGER.SideR.comment:
BSIS activation/deactivation,  to activate or deactivate function with all warnings, CAN outputs and related Error monitorings (see BSIS statemachine)
This info shall have highest priority for deactivation.

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.SWAS_Present.comment: SWAS ECU presence in the vehicle

cfg.RRRL_Radar_Config.BSIS_Deactivation_.comment: Possibility t deactivate/activate BSIS by the user
